园.english: land used for growing plants; site used for public recreation

门.english: gate; door; classifier for lessons, subjects, branches of technology

前.english: front; forward; ahead; first; top (followed by a number); former; formerly

后.english: back; behind; rear; afterwards; after; later

看.english: to see; to look at; to read; to watch; to visit; to call on; to consider; to regard as; to look after; to treat (an illness); to depend on; to feel (that); (after verb) to give it a try; Watch out! (for a danger)

后门.english: the back door; fig. under the counter (indirect way for influence or pressure)

好看.english: good-looking; nice-looking; good (of a movie, book, TV show etc); embarrassed; humiliated

兰.english: orchid (Cymbidium goeringii); fragrant thoroughwort (Eupatorium fortunei); lily magnolia

其他.english: other; (sth or sb) else; the rest

另外.english: additional; in addition; besides; separate; other; moreover; furthermore

看见.english: to see; to catch sight of
